overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through moonlit grasslands at night. The character traverses a dirt path through rolling prairie hills with distant mountains visible under a full moon, then turns around and walks back toward the starting area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt path

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the dirt path away from the camera through the moonlit grassland

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grass prairie
tall green grass covering the rolling hills
dark silhouetted mountains on the horizon
bright full moon illuminating the night sky
single large tree with dense foliage beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide-open prairie at night, with a cowboy character walking away from the camera along a dirt path. The full moon illuminates the scene from ahead, casting long shadows across the rolling grasslands with distant mountains silhouetted on the horizon. A large oak tree stands to the right of the path as the character progresses steadily forward through the empty landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt path

events.description: character executes a 180-degree turn and begins walking back in the opposite direction along the path

agents.ego_description: cowboy character turns around and walks back along the dirt path toward the camera's original starting position

segments.scene_description: After turning around, the character walks back along the same dirt path, with the camera now facing the opposite direction. The full moon shifts position in the frame as the character retraces their steps through the prairie grass. The oak tree passes out of view behind the character as they continue the return journey through the silent, moonlit landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a moonlit prairie as a cowboy traverses a dirt path and then retraces his steps. It begins with the character walking away from the camera toward a full moon that casts long shadows across rolling grasslands and silhouetted distant mountains. As the character progresses past a large oak tree standing to the right of the path, the camera maintains a steady trailing perspective through the empty landscape. The scene then shifts as the character turns around, causing the moon to reposition in the frame while the camera faces the opposite direction. Finally, the character walks back along the same dirt path, leaving the oak tree behind as he journeys through the silent, moonlit prairie.
